'''Othone''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Ruusan system/Legends|Hoth's Brand system]]. An [[Water/Legends|ice]] ball, it was the ninth planet [[Orbit/Legends|orbiting]] the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Hoth's Brand]]. It was named after [[Johun Othone]], who was killed by [[Darth Zannah/Legends|Darth Zannah]] during the [[Duel on Tython]].

{{Planet-stub}}
